description_long: This is a military-style SUV with a digital camouflage paint scheme, featuring a robust, angular body and large, rugged off-road tires. The vehicle is equipped with a mounted machine gun turret on the roof, protective armor plating, and a front bull bar for added defense. The side doors are open, revealing a utilitarian interior with two visible seats and minimalistic controls. An antenna is mounted on the rear, suggesting communication capabilities, and the rear view shows a license plate and two rear windows. The SUV's design emphasizes durability and tactical utility, with reinforced elements and aggressive styling. Its overall appearance is that of a specialized, combat-ready vehicle suitable for urban or rugged environments.
description: A camouflaged, armored SUV with a roof-mounted machine gun, large off-road tires, and open side doors revealing a basic interior. Designed for tactical use, it features reinforced plating and a front bull bar.
description_view_0: Front view shows the digital camouflage pattern, bull bar, large tires, and the roof-mounted machine gun turret.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the open door, visible interior seats, side armor plating, and the mounted antenna at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the license plate, rear windows, and the back of the turret, as well as the antenna and rear lights.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with open door, interior seats, and clear view of the turret and armor details.
attribute_wheel_design: Five thick, rugged spokes with deep tread off-road tires
